creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

Please reply-to-all to indicate your approval to the trivial patch in
this PR to your port; sonata [1] or mpdbrowser [2].

Thanks!

Chris

[1] http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/sonata-mpdname.diff
[2] http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/mpdbrowser-mpdname.diff
